productDisplayName: Puma Men College  Athletic White  Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash and iron inside-out Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron With a sporty touch, this College Athletic Polo T-shirt from puma is designed for the carefree college goer and makes for a perfect casual wear. Crafted from soft cotton, this T-shirt is sure to offer exemplary comfort, while the sporty print adds an athletic feel and is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
